resources.string: This operation will delete all account data and log out.
The account data has been deleted. You can go to Google Account for further processing.
Your Google account will not be affected.
Press the back button again to close the Ad.
In the next %s hours, all ads will be removed for you
Enjoy smooth video and music playback experience
All ads will be removed before %s
Congratulations on getting the ad-free privilege!
Watch 1 Rewarded Ad, and get %s hours ad-free privilege!
Watch rewarded video ads, remove all ads in the next %s hours
Watch 1 Rewarded Ad, and get %s hours ad-free privilege!
There is an issue with the current playback. The app needs to be restarted.
Do you want to resume playback from where you left off before the restart?
Enable the Creative Debugger SDK settings in order to view recent ads.
As explained in our Privacy Policy, with your consent, we may share this data with the following partners to allow them to serve personalized ads or content:
As explained in our Privacy Policy, with your consent, we may share this data with the following partners to help measure performance and improve our products and services:

Allowing us and/or our partners to use this data for personalized ads and content and other purposes, as described in our Privacy Policy:

• Gives you a more personalized experience, ads, and content

• Helps support product improvements and developments

• Allows you to participate in promotions
Giving you a more personal experience, including personalized ads and content
Helping support product improvements and developments
Allowing you to participate in promotions
Thank you for downloading our App! Allowing us and our partners to use this data helps us create a unique App experience, including by:

You can always change your selections later. If you choose not to share your data, you will still be able to access the App and you will still receive ads. However, those ads may be less relevant to your interests.

As explained in our Privacy Policy, with your consent, we collect certain information concerning your device, such as IP address and advertising identifiers. This data allows us and our partners to serve personalized ads and content and make improvements.\n\nBelow you can choose to allow us and/or our partners to use this data for the following purposes:
I certify that I am over the age of sixteen and that I have read and understood the Privacy Policy.
Displays more info about the list item.
Due to the policy, we cannot play music when the screen is locked. But we recommend turning on the Power Saving Mode for non-stop music streaming.
This content is provided by a third party website
According to YouTube\'s Terms of Use, this video cannot be played in the background.
This content has been blocked for you.
Use gestures to control player brightness
This channel doesn\'t feature any other channels
For child accounts, please contact your guardian.
Visit facebook.com/device and enter the code shown above.
To connect your account, open the Facebook app on your mobile device and check for notifications.
Restricted mode has hidden comments for this video.
%1$s won\'t work unless you enable Google Play services.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device.
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device.
%1$s won\'t run unless you update Google Play services.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are currently updating.
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
This form is for reports of infringement, please ensure that the following information you fill out is accurate, all statements must be true for you to submit your report.
Title and screenshot of content to report
URL(s) of original content, it could be a link to a video, a LIVE video, or music
Full legal name of the copyright owner
I am an authorized agent of the copyright owner
I am the legal counsel to the copyright owner
I am an employee of the copyright owner
I am a host, officer, or director (non-legal) of the copyright owner
Your relationship to the copyright owner
Seems to have encountered an error, please refresh or try again.
We have received your feedback. Please pay attention to the mailbox, we will process and reply you within 7 working days.
Click me to make a custom crash
Restart the App for the configuration to take effect
We ensure no ads interrupt your video. Ads may appear outside the video to support app operation. If any ad bothers you, please screenshot it and send feedback so we can address it promptly.
Hey, try this %1$s, all Premium features have been unlocked, background play and popup play are all free to use.
Note: Deleting playlists is a permanent action and cannot be undone.
Are you sure that you want to delete %1$s?
Click me to call js service
Force reporting of undeliverable Rx exceptions outside of fragment or activity lifecycle after disposal
Whether to clear private folders and reset password
Enter and set your passcode first
The passcode is inconsistent, please re-enter
Enter again to set your passcode
Current mode: Repeat all. Toggle repeat mode.
Current mode: Repeat none. Toggle repeat mode.
Current mode: Repeat one. Toggle repeat mode.
Start to play content faster but from less exact position when adjusting the video progress bar
Tap again to exit the application.
Sign in to see updates from your favorite channels
Watch history allows us to show you the latest videos tailored to your interests.
Leave your email or phone number so that we can contact you if needed.
Please describe the issue in details :)
Keep sliding, release to enter ad
Listen while you do other things
Are you sure clear all the history?
This list has no videos, please try pull down to refresh.
Request error, please try pull down to refresh.
Are you sure clear all the %1$s?
More interesting live and personalized recommendation videos are online!
If you block this person, you won\'t be able to see their messages. They won\'t see your messages either, unless you post to a channel where they\'re a moderator.
You have not creat a channel yet.
There is no chat news at this time,you can try to switch time for experience.
Thanks. We\'ve received your report. If we find this content to be in violation of our Community Guidelines, we will remove it.
All messages you send will appear publicly
Once deleted, the file cannot be recovered.
There is no song, please import the song file
There is no video, please import the video file
Please grant storage permissions to get the list.
Clear all files, the files will not be deleted, just removed from the list
Delete the %1$s playlist, and it won\'t delete the imported files
The content is empty，please enter the name
The language will change once the app is restarted.
Sign in now to browse your subscriptions and playlists.
This permission is needed to\nopen in popup mode
Tap to switch to selecting a day
Tap to switch to selecting a year
Please create a channel on YouTube before this action.
Restricted Mode has hidden discussions for this channel.
Subscribe to your favorite channels to get notified about their latest videos.
Allow app to send you notifications?
You\'ll get a notification with the link when you\'re back online
View the ad you saved when you were offline
We\'ll send you a notification with a link to the advertiser site.
Open ad when you\'re back online.
Timer: This Video has finished playing.
Sorry, the video failed to parse, please click to retry. Still can\'t solve it?
To support PIP mode, the app needs permission to appear above other apps.
To Minimize videos, the app needs permission to appear above other apps.
Your device cannot support that resolution
This selection will last until you leave Shorts. Some short videos may not be available in the quality you selected. For all short videos, go to %s
Please be noted that you need to pass the reCAPTCHA test to use the App. \nDon\'t forget to click Submit button under the I\'m not robot checkbox to finish the verification.
Click me to request YTB message push
Please fill out the required field.
Resume playback from last played position
Enjoying %1$s? How about showing your support by giving 5-star rating?
Adding download task successfully. Show your love by giving 5 stars?
%1$s has blocked %2$d ads for you today. Show your love by giving 5 stars?

Dear user:\nPlease be sure to carefully read and fully understand the terms of the service agreement and privacy policy, including but not limited to: In order to provide you with better services, we need to collect your application installation information, version number, operation logs, etc. for analysis and optimization application performance. thanks for your trust.\nYou can read the \"%1$s\" and \"%2$s\" for details. If you agree, please click the button below to start accepting our services.
Terms of service and Privacy Policy
Allow Ad to store image in Picture gallery?
Allow Ad to create a calendar event?
Users can conveniently and quickly search for resources, enhancing search efficiency and user experience.
Search terms include restricted keywords and search results cannot be displayed
All your search history will be deleted and it can’t be recovered.
Try different keywords or remove search filters
Hey! Check out this %1$s app. It provides premium service for free: ads-free, background play and more! Unlock all features by entering my invitation code: %2$s\n⏬ Install it now! ⏬
Hey! Check out this %1$s app. It provides premium service for free: ads-free, background play and more!\n⏬ Install it now! ⏬
Double click to like the video
Original texts from services will be visible in stream items
Show original time ago on items
Click me to show next push
Click me to show next YTB message push
Failed to get your login status, please try to sign in again
Subscribe to get the latest videos from channels you love
Sign in to see updates from your favorite YouTube channels
Add the reason you think bad
Prohibit request ads by compliance, please check GDPR settings
Placement is not bidding type, please check placement bidding type
Please check the country of the IP of the ad requesting device in service country
IP is empty or ua is empty
The sdk version used for the new insertion style is too low. Please upgrade to version 3550 and above
New ad slot exceeded daily request limit
Please update to version 2310 or later
We\'ll continue to improve our service.
You\'ve submitted feedback! Please don\'t submit again.
Tell us how this ad made you feel
Initialization check error, please check the AndroidManifest
error_ adn:%1$s no ads，please check ad network
slot setting error, pangle default ads will be displayed
You have prohibited authorized operation, please authorize
Network is unavailable, please try again later.
Report this ad to help us improve
Watch the entire video to claim your reward
Jump to details page or third party application
Shake or click to learn more
Go to details page or third-party application
Go to details page or third-party application
Twist the phone or tap the icon
Playing this content will use %.2f MB of data
Please turn off other players and retry.
Phone number or email for contact
Sorry for the bad experience you had. We\'d love to hear from you to improve our app.
Why do you want to uninstall %1$s？
Thanks for your feedback.We will use it to fix problems and improve our services.
Could not recognize the URL. Open with another app?
Feature is diabled due to YouTube limitation. We\'ve fixed this issue in latest version.
Loading time is longer due to YouTube bugs. We\'ve fixed this issue in latest version.
Ready to install, installation permissions are required.
No videos in this playlist yet
Sign in to see updates from your favorite channels
Attention. This video contains violent or inappropriate content.
click here to control the auto play switch.
Exit the page or switch %1$s to the background, the video will continue to play.
the video will be played in the form of a floating window.
Use gestures to control player volume
